name: Enrolment Confirmed
subject: Welcome to McKaynine — your enrolment is confirmed!
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Great news! Your enrolment for {dog_name} in {class_name} has been confirmed.

{class_fee}

Here's what to do next:

1. Download our app (PWA): {pwa_link}

2. Set up your account password: {password_setup_link}

3. Once you're in, please upload a photo of {dog_name} to complete your profile.

4. Enable push notifications in the app so you don't miss any updates about your class.

Your class information will be sent through the app each week.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

See you at class!
The McKaynine Team

name: Vet Clearance Certificate Request
subject: Action required: Vet clearance certificate for {dog_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Thank you for enrolling {dog_name} in {class_name}.

Before we can confirm your spot, we require a vet clearance certificate for {dog_name}.

Please follow these steps:

1. Download the vet clearance form: {vet_clearance_pdf_link}
2. Take it to your vet to complete and sign.
3. Upload the completed certificate here: {upload_link}

Once we've received and reviewed the certificate, we'll confirm your enrolment.

If you have any questions, please get in touch.

Kind regards,
The McKaynine Team

name: Enrolment Not Accepted
subject: Update on your enrolment for {dog_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Thank you for your interest in enrolling {dog_name} in {class_name}.

Unfortunately, after reviewing your application, we are unable to accept this enrolment at this time.

{reason}

We appreciate your understanding. If you'd like to discuss this further or explore other options, please feel free to contact us.

Kind regards,
The McKaynine Team

name: Class Assigned
subject: Your class is confirmed — here are your details, {handler_name}!
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Great news! {dog_name} has been placed in {class_name}.

Below are your class dates. Please save these — we look forward to seeing you and {dog_name} there!

If you haven't set up your account yet, you can do so via the link in your welcome email. Once you're in, you'll be able to view class updates, weekly content, and resources directly in the app.

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to get in touch.

See you at class!
The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Booking Invite
subject: Book Your Assessment — {dog_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Thank you for submitting your assessment questionnaire for {dog_name}. We've reviewed your form and everything looks great — we're ready to schedule your assessment.

Please use the link below to choose a date and time that works for you:

{booking_url}

This link is personalised for you — please don't share it.

Looking forward to meeting you and {dog_name}!

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Booking Confirmed
subject: Assessment Confirmed — {dog_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Your assessment for {dog_name} is confirmed. We look forward to meeting you both!

Date: {date}
Time: {time}
Location: {location}

A few things to bring:
- Your dog on a properly fitted collar or harness and leash
- High-value treats your dog loves
- Your vaccination card (if not already submitted)

See you soon!

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Reminder
subject: Reminder: Assessment Tomorrow — {dog_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Just a reminder that {dog_name}'s assessment is tomorrow!

Date: {date}
Time: {time}
Location: {location}

Remember to bring:
- Your dog on a properly fitted collar or harness and leash
- High-value treats your dog loves
- Your vaccination card (if not already submitted)

See you tomorrow!

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Outcome — Group Classes
subject: Great News — {dog_name} is Ready for Group Classes!
body:
Hi {handler_name},

We have great news! After reviewing {dog_name}'s assessment, we're pleased to let you know that {dog_name} is ready to join our group training classes.

We just need a bit more info to get {dog_name} added to our system before we confirm your class.

{enrol_url}

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Outcome — Private Lessons
subject: Your Assessment Outcome — Private Lessons Recommended
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Thank you for bringing {dog_name} in for their assessment. After careful evaluation, we believe {dog_name} would benefit most from private one-on-one lessons before joining a group class.

This is not a reflection of anything wrong — it simply means {dog_name} will get more focused attention and progress faster with individualised sessions.

Click the link below to get started. You'll fill in a couple of quick details, create your McKaynine account, and then choose a time for your first lesson — all in one go.

{private_lesson_url}

We look forward to working with you and {dog_name}!

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Outcome — Behaviourist Referral
subject: Your Assessment Outcome — Next Steps
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Thank you for bringing {dog_name} in for their assessment. After careful evaluation, we feel that {dog_name} would benefit from working with a certified animal behaviourist before joining our training programme.

We want to set you and {dog_name} up for the best possible experience, and a behaviourist will be able to provide the specialised support needed right now.

We'll follow up with some recommended contacts. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

The McKaynine Team

name: Off Week Reminder
subject: No class on {off_date} — {off_reason}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Just a quick reminder that there is no class for {dog_name} ({class_name}) on {off_date} due to {off_reason}.

Your next class is on {next_class_date}. See you then!

The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment — Class Confirmed
subject: You're in! {dog_name} is confirmed for {class_name}
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Great news — {dog_name} has been placed in {class_name}.

Below are your class details. Please save these — we look forward to seeing you and {dog_name} there!

Once you're logged into the app, you'll be able to view class updates, weekly content, and resources.

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to get in touch.

See you at class!
The McKaynine Team

name: Assessment Graduate — Enrolment Confirmed
subject: Welcome to McKaynine — your enrolment is confirmed!
body:
Hi {handler_name},

Great news — your enrolment for {dog_name} has been confirmed and we're looking forward to seeing you in class!

Based on {dog_name}'s assessment, we recommend the following classes:

{recommended_classes}

Once you've set up your account, you'll be able to browse these classes in the app and let us know your preference. We'll then confirm your placement and send through all the class details.

Here's what to do next:

1. Set up your account password: {password_setup_link}

2. Once you're in, please upload a photo of {dog_name} to complete your profile.

3. Enable push notifications so you don't miss any class updates.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

See you at class!
The McKaynine Team
